name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: ③① women who need us in NJ, VA & WA
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6215/24c69fd9/88f3c56e/189ccd4e/2569431946/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ21N_digital_email_20171012_ElectionsNextMonth_inact&source=WQEFEJ21N_digital_email_20171012_ElectionsNextMonth_inact")
---

Peter,

We are coming down to the wire.

In less than a month, New Jersey, Virginia, and Washington State will hold vital state and special elections. The outcome of those elections will have a huge impact in all three states, where we've endorsed 31 incredible women.

In these final weeks before Election Day, it's more important than ever that our candidates get the support they need to run strong, winning campaigns right up to the finish line.

**[Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women in New Jersey, Virginia, Washington State, and all across the country.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6215/24c69fd9/88f3c56e/189ccd4f/2569431946/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171012_email_ElectionsNextMonth?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ21N_digital_email_20171012_ElectionsNextMonth_inact&source=WQEFEJ21N_digital_email_20171012_ElectionsNextMonth_inact")**

All of New Jersey's state legislative seats are up for election in November, and we've endorsed eight women across both chambers, plus lieutenant governor candidate Sheila Oliver.

The seats in Virginia's House of Delegates are also up for a vote, and we've backed 16 women who want to make gains in the state House and help flip it from red to blue.

And in Washington State's upcoming special election, we've endorsed six women ready to serve.

While the Trump administration continues to do everything in its power to roll back progress, we need pro-choice Democratic women in state legislatures where they can fight back and protect our rights. I know this firsthand -- I served 10 years in the Maine Legislature and worked to fight back against countless Republican attacks on women, children, working families, and the environment.

**Donate $3 to help elect our 31 women in New Jersey, Virginia, and Washington State and ALL of our women running across the country:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elections-We-Can-Win](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6215/24c69fd9/88f3c56e/189ccd48/2569431946/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171012_email_ElectionsNextMonth?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectionsWeCanWi&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ21N_digital_email_20171012_ElectionsNextMonth_inact&source=WQEFEJ21N_digital_email_20171012_ElectionsNextMonth_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

name: The White House
subject: Defending Our Freedoms, Securing Our Homeland
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=658c033538102031e63be2374f9639affa680b0285cbcfc428153f54e30ea90bc87d2dd746ef18944f1fee86895251346eb24f181be3ba2f

President Trump's Weekly Address

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=658c03353810203122483c2796b614bf3fceca7f49c714dadf74c0051fdd96c7777a3a315ac3844d8942c1028fbe72c6390c57c5ebf8de8d

Promoting Healthcare and Competition
On Thursday, President Donald J. Trump signed an Executive Order promoting healthcare choice and competition in the Roosevelt Room of the White House. The Order will expand choices and alternatives to Obamacare plans and increase competition to bring down the costs for consumers. The Executive Order directs the Department of Health and Human Services, the Treasury, and the Department of Labor to “take action to increase competition, increase choice, and increase access to lower-priced, high-quality healthcare options.”

President Trump firmly believes “the time has come to give Americans the freedom to purchase health insurance across state lines, which will create a truly competitive national marketplace that will bring costs way down and provide far better care.”

Read the President’s full remarks
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=658c0335381020315554cbc0955623244207a9204237a4992e2b6261009c64960875575322cef1164b4790084bd63355839ce1dcf628c388
here.

Making America Prosperous
“Make no mistake — tax reform works, and North Carolina is a prime example. These reforms are boosting our state’s climate for job creation, driving down unemployment, and returning more money to the families and small businesses that earned it.” – Robin Hayes,
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=658c033538102031b5a3511d69b5e090bb44e4506ebc6313b8a261841607dc05f3cace073dc222700fae824c3efe0c7be5197f0a909c02f9
“A state model for federal tax relief” (The Washington Times, October 2)

Tax reform is finding friends among American manufacturers and industries. As Robin Hayes wrote in The Washington Times, it’s serving citizens and small businesses.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f6e270db87cdb466a57ed635596e6b63b53820f3b4368530d7f807928780733731bd3906d29d71f8d1f12271cf059b010ce9c5d0f2049732
Get the facts on the Administration’s tax relief plan and
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f6e270db87cdb466e502360f255f6925ce6271d6ade30f41a20d95a1e4a68630bb81afb31f57954664db3507e65f06da080b469f24a4acd1
learn more about how tax reform will help America’s economy thrive.

Kirstjen Nielsen Nominated as Secretary of Homeland Security
On Thursday afternoon in the East Room of the White House, President Trump announced his nomination of Kirstjen Nielsen as Secretary of Homeland Security (DHS).
“Kirstjen has my full faith and confidence, and she also has the complete confidence of the law enforcement officers, dedicated professionals, and senior leadership at the Department of Homeland Security,” the President said.

President Trump also commended Acting Secretary Elaine Duke’s service in the wake of numerous natural disasters on American soil. Duke will now serve alongside Nielsen as Deputy Secretary of Homeland Security.

“I share the President's profound commitment to the security of our country and the safety of the American people,” Nielsen said. “Truly, there is nothing more valuable than to feel safe and secure in your homeland.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f6e270db87cdb466496d47ce1aa6921eda7ac242bf32326bc088a34c51641d9a35b573a5c9f3a55c655b23350532f91d1e500fe099b690c9
Watch the announcement here.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump signs the Executive Order to Promote Healthcare Choice and Competition | October 12, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS AND VP TODAY

This morning, President Trump delivered remarks to the 2017 Values Voter Summit in Washington, D.C. This afternoon, the President will deliver a statement on the Iran strategy from the White House.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f6e270db87cdb466315140b18beefd63640a7d50aaa557fefb45c46b1288d81a42de3dc7edbb3cfc27963d3140444bc7dfeef8d39dcc1172
Watch live at 12:45pm ET. Later, the President and First Lady will visit the United States Secret Service (USSS) training facility.

Vice President Mike Pence is traveling to New York to discuss the President’s America First tax relief plan.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f6e270db87cdb4667bbb956231152473addf3dd1f28028b85d750e4f538411fdbb6a0364c96605f056628e49d27374cdb5bdf5020510ab35
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f6e270db87cdb466830c6aded70f1708aa89eac6e35bcdb98963e45c21a0bac8066381376c4baa156e39644eb74e63f891314d91f08837df
Contact the White House |

Friend,

**"Instead of playing by the rules, Republican legislators are replacing the referees."**

That's what _Slate_ had to say about the latest move by Republicans in the legislature.

Unhappy with their laws being ruled unconstitutional, they called themselves into a special session last week and passed a law that eliminates all primary elections for judicial races next year.

**[This has to stop. Roy vetoed their bill, but we know they're going to try to overturn his veto. Add your name here to let them know you have Roy's back.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12033b4/2fde7c66/4460a862/1569b19b/2705397431/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTciLCJKU1ZNUVZOVVRrRk5SU1VsIjoiIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/-add-your-name-tell-republicans-stop-rigging-the-system-?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&lastname=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=2+-+This+has+to+stop+Roy+vetoed+their+bill+b&utm_campaign=em17_171013_judge2_adv_gq_ful__TC&source=em17_171013_judge2_adv_gq_ful__TC")**

This is the first step toward a constitutional amendment that will have the legislature selecting judges that are supposed to hold them accountable.

We simply cannot let that happen. We can't let them replace judges just because they don't get their way.

**[Take a stand today. Let Republicans in the legislature know you have Roy's back -- and that you expect them to stop trying to rig the system.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12033b4/2fde7c66/4460a862/1569b19a/2705397431/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTciLCJKU1ZNUVZOVVRrRk5SU1VsIjoiIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/-add-your-name-tell-republicans-stop-rigging-the-system-?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&lastname=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=3+-+Take+a+stand+today+Let+Republicans+in+th&utm_campaign=em17_171013_judge2_adv_gq_ful__TC&source=em17_171013_judge2_adv_gq_ful__TC")**

name: DNC Rapid Response
subject: ❗BREAKING: Trump cancels subsidies for millions of low-income Americans
body:
Stand with Democrats to save the Affordable Care Act.
---
**Trump is canceling critical Obamacare subsidies that save lives. Add your name: Tell Trump and the GOP to stop sabotaging our health care system.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-Health-Care-Sabotage1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20171013_dnc4_nd&source=em_20171013_dnc4_nd")**
Derek --

Last night, Donald Trump announced he's canceling subsidies that put health insurance in reach for millions of low-income Americans.

It was the second of a one-two punch to try to end Obamacare: Just hours before, he signed an executive order allowing businesses to skirt the Affordable Care Act's protections and purchase bare-bones insurance plans instead.

**[We need to step up like never before, Derek. Add your name now if you're ready to keep fighting to protect our care.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-Health-Care-Sabotage1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+We+need+to+step+up+like+never+beforeCUST&utm_campaign=em_20171013_dnc4_nd&source=em_20171013_dnc4_nd")**

Without these subsidies, insurers have warned that premiums will skyrocket and state insurance marketplaces could crumble. And under the new executive order, millions of Americans could once again be denied coverage for something as common as a pre-existing condition.

Obamacare literally saves lives -- but Donald Trump doesn't care. He's willing to let people die if it means he can claim a big political win.

Call it craven, call it heartless and cruel. But don't let this moment pass you by.

**Add your name now to tell Trump that you're one of the millions of Americans who will _never_ stop fighting to protect our care:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-Health-Care-Sabotage1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20171013_dnc4_nd&source=em_20171013_dnc4_nd")**
Thanks,

DNC Rapid Response

subject: Counting on you, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend,

The battle for tax reform is coming. We will need to be prepared.

**Not only will we fight the tax-and-spend Democrats, but we will face a legion of lobbyists -- armed with deep pockets and protected by a web of liberal elites.**

And when they descend upon us, I will need you, Friend. I will need you and our army of conservative foot soldiers to take a stand against this special interest siege.

[**Can I count on you?**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MzEwMTI3MTES1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MTY5MTU5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

The fact is, our current tax code is bleeding us internally -- sapping our spirit and enabling our decline. And thanks to all the loopholes, special interest vampires are benefiting while everyday Americans, like you, are forced to live paycheck to paycheck.

Enough is enough. We have this one opportunity to reform our tax system. We have this one opportunity to change our country's course and put us on the path to prosperity.
**
[Stand with me today, Friend.](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MzEwMTI3MTES1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MTY5MTU5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0) **Together we will get this done.
****
Thank you,

Paul Ryan

clean_body: "" "" Team -- Last week, the Koch Brothers-backed dark money group, Americans for Prosperity, announced $1.5 MILLION in attack ads against one of Senator Hassan's biggest allies in Congress, Senator Tammy Baldwin. The best way for Tammy to withstand these attacks from corporate billionaires is to show them that the grassroots momentum is on our side. We told Tammy that we 'd help her with a groundswell of support and collect 250 donations for her campaign by midnight, so we need your help. "" Tammy's campaign isn't about a couple of wealthy campaign backers. It's about us -- the single mom working three jobs to create a better life for her kids, the brother living with diabetes, and the friend who is working to launch their small business. But the truth is, the system is rigged against folks like us. When billionaires like the Kochs spend big to cut their own taxes, elect their preferred candidate, and lock in their place in the 1%, we all have to do everything we can to elect leaders like Tammy who are working to level the playing field. We can beat the Kochs and their outside spending, but only if everyone here gives what they can to help reelect Tammy. "" Thanks for helping, Team Maggie ""

name: Bill McKibben
subject: Communication is Key
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
#
Friend,
Communication is key--the best ideas in the world don't mean a thing if you can't figure out a pithy way to get them across. That's why the Sanders Institute is so important: it's working in the tradition of the best explainer in contemporary American politics, a man who's able to get across the essence of what needs to happen in language that sticks.
Consider "Medicare for all," which is the perfect way of taking the word salad that surrounds health care policy and putting it in terms all of us viscerally get (including those, like me, who've been intimidated by the insurance industry's endless efforts to "complexify" the problem behind an endless screen of words." Or think about "Fight for $15." Everyone who hears it immediately imagines what it would be like trying to live on less than that: it brings the idea of "living wage" into sharp focus.
For those of us working on the environment, "100 Percent Renewable" is the new watchword. It sums up what we need to do: move off coal, oil, and gas and on to sun and wind. And it makes it clear it's urgent: we have to go all the way and we have to do it fast. No more half measures. (Here's an [essay](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aed1/bed43eb/19d2c91b/75fffb9d/1060373937/VEsH/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/the-unimaginable-is-now-possible-100-renewable-energy-we-cant-settle-for-less") I wrote recently for In These Times that makes the case). That's why we were so happy when Bernie, and Oregon Senator Jeff Merkley, introduced a Senate bill this year demanding 100% Renewable.
And it's why we should all be grateful to the Sanders Institute. It's a powerful megaphone for repeating, explaining, and underlining these profound and simple--but never simplistic--messages.
I was pleased when Jane Sanders asked me to be a founding Fellow of the institute. Like all the fellows I donate my time, and since I have more on my plate than I should, it's always a little hard to know where to make such commitments. [**But I hope many of you will be able to donate a little money to help build the Institute 's reach.**](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aed1/bed43eb/19d2c91b/75fffb9c/1060373937/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=em171013-full")
Movements, ultimately, run on ideas. And the Institute is a place where ideas live. Help if you can!
Thanks,
Bill McKibben, Sanders Institute Founding Fellow, 2017

Friend, If you ask the average Wisconsinite whether or not we need tax reform, they'll answer quickly: YES!

Friend,

If you ask the average Wisconsinite whether or not we need tax reform, they'll answer quickly: YES!

But when you ask our so-called leaders in Washington? They struggle. It's the perfect example of why we need change! They’re out of touch!

But I’m with you. I will always stand for cutting taxes -- today, and when I get to Washington. Just like I stood for tax cuts in Madison.

Friend, If you ask the average Wisconsinite whether or not we need tax reform, they'll answer quickly: YES! But when you ask our so-called leaders in Washington? They struggle. It's the perfect example of why we need change! They’re out of touch! But I’m with you. I will always stand for cutting taxes -- today, and when I get to Washington. Just like I stood for tax cuts in Madison. to send a strong message to those choosing high taxes and special interests over Wisconsin families: WE WANT TAX CUTS! Wisconsin taxpayers have had to foot the bill for too many of Washington's failed special interests problems. It's about time we put an end to the harmful tax system and bring real, conservative change to Washington. You can help today by signing here: It’ll only take a minute, friend. | **We're Ready!**
* * *
The official beginning of 2018 may still be over two months away, but we’re ready to go! This week, [Treasurer of State](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a63261b1ab&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0b2155cde2&e=1acd9bb3d6)[**Kelly Mitchell**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0ae8044e00&e=1acd9bb3d6)**** joined [Secretary of State **Connie Lawson**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cb27dafdb6&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Auditor of State **Tera Klutz**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0a95e1a70f&e=1acd9bb3d6) in officially announcing her intention to seek re-election. Or, in the case of Auditor Klutz, running statewide for the first time! Each of them has produced impressive results on behalf of Hoosier taxpayers, and Governor **Eric Holcomb** and I are supporting them 100 percent. In fact, State Party has been hard at work coordinating with their campaigns to ensure big victories next November. While it’s their job to govern effectively, it’s our job to win elections. And we’re going to win big with this dynamic trio of proven Republican leaders at the top of our ticket!

\- Kyle Hupfer

(Photo: Chairman Hupfer with Governor Holcomb and Auditor Klutz at her Indianapolis campaign kick-off event Tuesday night.)
* * *

| | _**Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**_
---
|
---
|
---
| This week, Governor Holcomb [unveiled an incredible initiative](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3a09331d1a&e=1acd9bb3d6) aimed at tackling our state's opioid epidemic. The initiative includes a $50 million investment from Indiana University to attack the epidemic at its roots and combat the very core of addiction. The multi-faceted partnership, incorporating Indiana University's seven campuses around Indiana, will be one of the largest coordinated strategies to combat opioid abuse in the nation. In making the announcement, Governor Holcomb said, “This initiative is going to save lives and give more hope to the far too many hopeless.”

The Governor also [made a trek down south to Evansville](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7691f803bb&e=1acd9bb3d6) to participate in the Aim Ideas Summit and discuss the future of the Hoosier State. He even brought his Cabinet along for the ride so they could meet with local officials from across the state. The Governor and his team emphasized the importance of developing new strategies with local leaders and mayors across Indiana on jobs, economic development, attacking the drug epidemic and strengthening our workforce.
---
|

| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=75a63529fd&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
**_Federal Tax Reform Gains Steam_** Americans across the nation from both sides of the aisle are calling for a overhaul of the current federal tax system. Hoosiers here at home, given a taste of the success that can come from tax reform, are voicing their support, too. State Representative **Heath Van Natter** , [in a Kokomo Tribune letter to the editor](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=72f561f2e7&e=1acd9bb3d6), wrote, “We have so much potential if Washington would do us all a favor and fix our tax code and get out of the way.”

**Ron Haendiges** of New Salisbury [wrote in the Corydon Democrat](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=60e777010d&e=1acd9bb3d6) that, “Any major shift in policy deserves bipartisan consideration, and there is a window here for Democrats and Republicans to work together and send a tax reform bill to the President’s desk.”

President **Donald Trump** and Vice President **Mike Pence** are doing exactly that. They are working hard to deliver for the American people. In fact, this past week [President Trump was in Pennsylvania](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=077896b031&e=1acd9bb3d6) to lay out what he hopes to accomplish in getting tax reform passed. The speech was similar to that of the one he gave in Indiana a few weeks ago - but if you're so inclined, [you can watch it here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=688f7dfe64&e=1acd9bb3d6). The bottom line is this: we need to work together and get behind the President in his efforts to reform the current federal tax system. We need tax reform to be competitive, simple, and fair for all hard working Americans!

[The Richard G. Lugar Excellence in Public Service Series ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b87852fc6a&e=1acd9bb3d6)will hold their [2017 Opening Reception](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=15e8bd61b6&e=1acd9bb3d6) on Tuesday, October 24, 2017, in Indianapolis. The Lugar Series aims to increase the preparation, number, and influence of Republican women leaders in elected and appointed governmental positions. name: Jay Inslee
subject: Before DeVos comes to WA...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Betsy DeVos will be in WA today. Her radical policies are not welcome here.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTIxMzgyNDQS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI2MTE4MjE2OQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Friend, Today, Betsy DeVos is coming to Washington, her first appearance in our state as Secretary of Education. You would think she would come to visit one of our public schools, some of the best in the country, or one of our world-class public colleges. Instead, she's here to talk to a group of rich donors of the conservative Washington Policy Center at the Hyatt Regency in Bellevue, for a minimum of $350 a plate. Again and again, Secretary DeVos caters to for-profit companies, not our kids. She's selling out public schools to the highest bidder, slashing education programs left and right, pushing a radical scheme that prioritizes privatization -- at a time when Washington has made massive investments to support our public schools and kids. To Betsy Devos, public education is the enemy, rather than the vehicle, of achievement. We know how significantly the DeVos-Trump agenda will negatively impact our kids, educators, and parents. And we won't stand for it. [**As Secretary DeVos lands in Washington, send a clear message by signing on now to tell her that her radical policies are not welcome here.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTIxMzgyNDQS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI2MTE4MjE2OQS2&mt=1&rt=0) | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTIxMzgyNDQS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI2MTE4MjE2OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
DeVos simply doesn't value public education in the same way we do.
If Secretary DeVos spent time in our Washington schools, with our educators, students, and parents -- she'd see schools that are helping to drive one of the strongest economies in the country. She would see an early learning system that is one of the best in the country.
[**Before Betsy DeVos steps foot in that Bellevue Hyatt, sign on to join me in showing DeVos that Washington state is not going to take any attempts to strip away our funding for public education.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTIxMzgyNDQS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI2MTE4MjE2OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6206/24c69fd9/8742f870/189cc062/3506958467/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ23N_digital_email_20171013_EWStickerLastCall_inact&source=WQEFEJ23N_digital_email_20171013_EWStickerLastCall_inact")

Peter,

When we were designing our new sticker, we wanted something that would perfectly capture what EMILY's List is all about -- and how we define success.

We landed on these two simple words that mean so much: elect. women.

**[We're putting in our first order of stickers soon, so time is running out to get yours. Donate $3 and we'll send you an "Elect Women" sticker so you can show your EMILY's List pride!](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6206/24c69fd9/8742f870/189cc063/3506958467/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171006_email_ElectWomenSticker?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Were+putting+in+our+first+order+of+stick&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ23N_digital_email_20171013_EWStickerLastCall_inact&source=WQEFEJ23N_digital_email_20171013_EWStickerLastCall_inact")**

Electing women is our goal next month, next year, and beyond.

We're supporting dozens of pro-choice Democratic women running for state legislative seats in Virginia, Washington State, and New Jersey, along with several special elections around the country this year.

Next year, nine of our Senate women are up for re-election, and we want to add two more to their ranks. We've also endorsed seven women running for governor and 12 women running for the House from coast to coast.

Electing women is what we do, it's who we are, and now, you can say it loud and proud.

Kelly Biggs

body:
With Trump's latest announcement, he is deliberately trying to force Obamacare to fail. Fight back now to save Obamacare.
---
**[](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954de90/2b07114c/e21236d9/7315795c/3576415439/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/oppose-trumps-obamacare-sabotage?source=PT-20171013-Signature_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")**

_**ABC News: "Trump to end Obamacare subsidies that help low-income Americans"**_
Team,

Donald Trump is deliberately trying to force Obamacare to fail.

It was bad enough that he signed an executive order yesterday undermining key Obamacare protections and benefits. Now, he's also ending subsidies that help make insurance coverage affordable for low-income Americans.

[**We have to fight back right now if we 're going to save Obamacare as we know it. Add your name to oppose Trump's decision to end subsidies and sabotage Obamacare.**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954de90/2b07114c/e21236d9/7315795c/3576415439/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/oppose-trumps-obamacare-sabotage?source=PT-20171013-Signature_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

According to the nonpartisan CBO, Trump's actions will _immediately_ increase the number of Americans without insurance.

And as _ABC News_ reported today, this decision will also "further roil the already unstable insurance market" \-- which means higher premiums for everyone.

Trump tweeted this morning that "ObamaCare is imploding." Let's be clear: the reason Obamacare is at risk is that Trump is doing everything in his power to sabotage it.

From failing to promote Obamacare enrollment to allowing junk insurance plans and now ending subsides, Trump is recklessly gutting Obamacare to push his personal agenda -- and millions of working Americans will pay the price.

[**We stopped Obamacare repeal in the Senate twice, but we 're not done saving Obamacare yet. Add your name right now to oppose Trump's actions to sabotage Obamacare.**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954de90/2b07114c/e21236d9/7315795c/3576415439/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/oppose-trumps-obamacare-sabotage?source=PT-20171013-Signature_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

Thank you,

Team DSCC

When we say that we're counting on grassroots donors to protect Senate Democrats, we're not kidding. In fact, a full 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We don't have the Koch brothers in our corner -- we have you. And every gift you give the DSCC is a gift we use to propel our Senate candidates to victory.

**NH REPUBLICAN PARTY****WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, OCTOBER 13TH** **_A Note From Jeanie_** **Dear Derek,******
**We’re very excited that Republican National Committee Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel is coming to New Hampshire on Monday, October 16th!********Ronna has done an outstanding job raising money for Republicans – her efforts to date are double what the Democrats are raising nationally.********We’re looking forward to hearing directly from Ronna about what’s happening in Washington, D.C., unfiltered by the media. Her consistent message is one of how the President is making real progress whether its meaningful tax cuts for the middle class, rolling back onerous regulations, negotiating better trade deals, and fostering energy independence, or making good on his promise to the 28 million Americans left behind by failures of Obamacare. ****
****[RSVP today and see Ronna at Tinos Kitchen& Bar in Hampton on Monday, October 16th at 4:30 p.m. RSVP here.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=8W-2B0ovlN66MrpBErbIEL-2BVnHUO60gFoExbeylmRqOwo-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MuF3-2BggTiSOAVIHm780A7pDL11q4fw31rLBAZid09rJmjT6mEC8eE1e7UfBFiHrXsg4mbjgZPVmU7wEWvjXLPsbRaFZ1HXgb0oi2-2Fvt7lIeOx7KR4P-2BGk7OqDSxAvO9RFGqXGUP-2BnCOFwNYb7JmCuFsYWetCKiTF45Oh7ystuNl4f2UDX6ZFwwuFl7wrZIekR13prigQqgp7UqCJYlI-2FcS-2FItsvHYjM7yq9QqykGRjKKmYPdFK6w9GJ5FSrqeYhnzWzeGh8cgBb3l4hA-2FjgGlwQ-3D-3D)******
**Sincerely, **
**Jeanie** **Join the Grassroots Circle!**

body:
****
**** **** | |
| | **October 13, 2017**
---|---

All through the House, Paul Ryan and Republicans are busy fixing our broken tax code. Closing special-interest loopholes and lowering rates will not only result in more jobs and bigger paychecks, but you will get to keep more of that paycheck. This is the most important thing we can do to help hardworking Americans in their everyday lives. And Paul Ryan is determined to see it through - so determined, that he will cancel Christmas break in Washington if that's what it takes to get this done for the American people.
| **** | **The Wall Street Journal**
---
**Tax Reform Will Give Workers a Raise******

_
The tax-reform package now working its way through Congress is well-designed and far-reaching. It aims to address the reasons that the current economic recovery has been the most anemic on record. If it becomes law, we can expect economic growth to accelerate to roughly 3.2% for the next three to five years...

Over the next five years, we should see labor's share of the economy rise by four points, from the current 59% to 63%--a growing slice of a growing pie. It would not be surprising to see real wage increases of 4% to 5%. By contrast, in the current expansion, real wage growth has been flat, if not negative._

[**Read More**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MzEwMjAxMzIS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MTczMzI5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
****
| **** | **The Hill**
---
**Middle-class families are the real winners in the GOP tax plan**********

_
The unified Republican tax reform framework released last month cuts taxes and increases take-home pay for the middle class while simplifying the code for millions of American families.

First, the framework consolidates the existing seven tax brackets into three -- 12 percent, 25 percent, and 35 percent, giving rate reduction to all.

In addition, the plan doubles the standard deduction to $24,000 for a family and $12,000 for individuals, meaning this amount is taxed at zero percent, a significant tax reduction for millions of Americans.
...

By any measure, the middle class is the winner of this tax reform plan. Under the unified framework released last month, American families will see tax cuts, tax simplification, new or better jobs, and more take-home pay._

[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MzEwMjAxMzIS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MTczMzI5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)[**Read More**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MzEwMjAxMzIS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MTczMzI5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)****
****
| | **FOX News**
---
**Higher paychecks a big goal of tax reform plan**

****
_
House Ways and Means Committee chairman details Republicans ' strategy, talks eliminating ObamaCare subsidies and offsetting the cost of hurricane damage.___

[**Read More**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MzEwMjAxMzIS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MTczMzI5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)****
****
| **** | **Politico**
---
**Ryan makes plea for GOP unity on tax reform******

_Among the biggest drags on our nation 's economy in recent years have been excessive regulation and a tax code that is not competitive with the rest of the world. While we have made progress in Washington to ease the regulatory burden, now is the time to enact meaningful tax reform.

In addition to making businesses more competitive, comprehensive tax reform can provide tax relief for families and lead to more jobs in West Virginia, higher wages for workers and increased economic prosperity. We need to create an environment that leads to more investment in our state and continued job growth.___

[**Read More**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MzEwMjAxMzIS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MTczMzI5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)****
****
| **** | **The Washington Examiner**
---
**Paul Ryan warns Congress he 'll keep them voting on Christmas for tax reform**

_House Speaker Paul Ryan warned representatives Thursday he would keep them in Washington through the holidays if they delay passing tax reform.

"We're going to keep people here for Christmas if we have to," the Wisconsinite said at an event at the conservative Heritage Foundation. "I mean, I don't care -- we gotta get this done. It's that important."_
